title: DecompositionManifest
description: Ordered list of independently-shippable briefs produced by the decomposer agent. Absorbs the work-decomposition skill's richer optional fields (coverage_note; per-brief title/kind/scope/acceptance/risk) while keeping id/brief/gate_command/deps as fleet's required contract.

coverage_note.description: How the briefs together fully cover the source proposal/epic — the completeness claim an adversarial review attacks.

briefs.description: Ordered briefs — deps must reference earlier IDs only.

brief.description: Scoped task description for the maker agent — self-contained.

scope.description: File/dir globs this brief may touch — the write boundary.

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria for the brief, when spelled out.

gate_command.description: Deterministic shell command that exits 0 on success.

deps.description: IDs of briefs that must ship before this one (acyclic).
